title: ochna coccinea
intro: Ochna coccinea, also known as the bird's eye or Mickey mouse plant, is a small, deciduous shrub native to southern Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ochna coccinea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Ochna coccinea is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
